{{unk|ja|sort=гҒҹгӮҠ}}. Possibly an extension of the nominalized continuative form ''tari'' of {{der|ja|ojp|-|sort=гҒҹгӮҠ}}-derived verb {{m|ja|еһӮгӮӢ|tr=taru||to hang down, to hang off of|pos=superseded by modern {{m|ja|еһӮгӮҢгӮӢ}} ''tareru''}}. Appears with this reading in the {{lang|ja|ж–°йҒёеӯ—йҸЎ}} (''Shinsen JikyЕҚ''){{R:Kokugo Dai Jiten}} Japanese dictionary of Chinese,{{RQ:Shinsen JikyЕҚ}} compiled in 898-901. ====Pronunciation==== {{ja-pron|гҒҹгӮҠ}} ====Noun==== {{ja-noun|гҒҹгӮҠ}} # {{lb|ja|sort=гҒҹгӮҠ|obsolete|rare}} a small [[protrusion]] of the [[skin]]: a [[wart]], a [[verruca]], a [[skin tag]] ===Etymology 3=== {{ja-kanjitab|yomi=on|гӮҶгҒҶ}} From {{der|ja|ltc|sort=гӮҶгҒҶ|-}} {{ltc-l|з–Ј}}. ====Pronunciation==== {{ja-pron|гӮҶгҒҶ}} ====Affix==== {{ja-pos|affix|гӮҶгҒҶ|hhira=гҒ„гҒҶ}} # {{lb|ja|sort=гӮҶгҒҶ|rare|medical|only in compounds}} a small [[protrusion]] of the [[skin]]: a [[wart]], a [[verruca]], a [[skin tag]] =====Derived terms===== {{col|ja |{{ja-r|з–Ји…«|гӮҶгҒҶгҒ—гӮ…}}: a [[sycoma]], a [[skin tag]] |{{ja-r|з–ЈзҠ¶|гӮҶгҒҶгҒҳгӮҮгҒҶ}}: [[verrucous]], [[verruciform]] |{{ja-r|з–Јиҙ…|гӮҶгҒҶгҒңгҒ„}}: a small [[protrusion]] of the [[skin]], more specifically caused by [[human papillomavirus|HPV]]: a [[wart]], a [[verruca]], a [[skin tag]] |{{ja-r|з–Јиҙ…з—Ү|гӮҶгҒҶгҒңгҒ„гҒ—гӮҮгҒҶ}}: [[keratiasis]], [[keratosis]] |{{ja-r|дё»з–Ј|гҒ—гӮ…гӮҶгҒҶ}}: [[primary]] [[tubercle]] |{{ja-r|е°Ҹз–Ј|гҒ—гӮҮгҒҶгӮҶгҒҶ}}: a [[thymion]] |{{ja-r|иҙ…з–Ј|гҒңгҒ„гӮҶгҒҶ}}: a [[bump]] or [[knot]] of useless [[flesh]]; something [[useless]] |{{ja-r|и¶іеә•з–Јиҙ…|гҒқгҒҸгҒҰгҒ„ гӮҶгҒҶгҒңгҒ„}}: a [[plantar]] [[wart]] |{{ja-r|и»ҹз–Ј|гҒӘгӮ“гӮҶгҒҶ}}: a [[soft]] [[wart]], a [[molluscum]] }} ===References=== ==Korean== ===Hanja=== {{ko-hanja|hangeul=мң |eumhun=|mr=yu|y=yu}} # {{rfdef|ko|sort=з–’04}}
